title: Velvety Smoky French Cod Stew
description: A midnightcraving, pescatarian-friendly French stew that marries tender cod with smoky paprika and a velvety tomato broth.
instructions: Pat cod fillets dry and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add cod and sear 2–3 min each side until just browned; remove and set aside.
In the same pot, add the remaining oil, onion, and garlic; sauté until the onion becomes translucent (~5 min).
Stir in smoked paprika and cook 1 min to toast the spices.
Add crushed tomatoes and fish stock, bring to a gentle simmer; add thyme sprigs.
Return the cod to the pot, cover, and simmer for 8 min until the fish flakes easily (internal temp 63 °C).
Remove the thyme sprigs and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, optionally with a squeeze of lemon.
